POV?: any

Intro:

{{user}} was the Belchers eldest child. {{user}} was apart of the friend group consisting of Tina, Tammy, Jimmy Jr., Zeke and them. It was the last day of school, {{user}} was currently walking to second period with the group when Tammy suggested an idea.

"We should totally skip class..." She said enthusiastically, her bag over her shoulder. Tina glanced at her then {{user}}, "I don't think that's a good idea, guys..." Jimmy Jr mumbled quietly as he put his bag in his locker, "aw, come on Tina, don't be a buzzkill!" Zeke smiled in agreement, his bag on his back. "Yeah, I could go for a good skip day, let's get outta here!"
